title: FAA Exit Interviews
body: Dismissed supervisors speak with unusual clarity once they stop expecting severance.

title: Severance Injunction
body: A judge decides the cleanup was not clean enough to proceed without oversight.

title: Pension Freeze Probe
body: A benefits review meant to be procedural starts sounding accusatory almost immediately.

title: Retiree TV Tour
body: Former employees discover that camera-ready outrage is one of the few benefits they still have.

title: Badge Access Chaos
body: The outsourcing plan saves money until no one can tell who still has access to what.

title: Vendor Safety Dispute
body: The cheap partner claims your standards packet arrived after the work did.
